Item: <BIBL><TITLE>Ubungen sich stets in der Gegenwart GOttes zu halten</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT></BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation: Fixed 13 instances of severe character encoding corruption (mojibake) by replacing garbled Unicode sequences with correct German umlauts and standard bibliographic abbreviations (e.g., '8vo' for octavo). Corrected one structural XML error where the second book by Johann Arndt was incorrectly nested inside the first <BIBL> element by inserting the missing closing </BIBL> tag. Preserved original historical orthography and punctuation.
